title: Per-tenant usernames — leon can exist in each workspace
description:
Create user was checking username globally while the Settings list only shows your tenant. A name like leon could exist on the platform or another SaaS box, blocking creation with Username already exists even though it was not visible.

Usernames are now unique per tenant portal scope (tenant-{slug}), not platform-wide. Duplicate checks and login on company subdomains only look inside that virtualbox.

Who is affected: SaaS workspace owners creating employees in Settings.
changeLog: Replace global username UNIQUE with per-tenant portal scope index.
Create user checks duplicates only within the signed-in workspace.
Tenant subdomain login matches users inside that box only.
Clearer error: Username already exists in your workspace.
